history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a young man
Angel kamera/framing: eye-level medium shot, framing the subject from the mid-thighs up, with a slight upward tilt to capture the upper body and head. The composition is centered on the man, with the white picket fence cutting horizontally across the lower third of the frame and the lush greenery and white house structure forming the background. The framing is tight enough to focus on the subject and his immediate surroundings, creating an intimate yet outdoor feel.
Outfit: The subject wears a cream-colored, oversized hoodie made of a thick, slightly textured cotton material. The hoodie has a drawstring hood that is partially pulled up, with the drawstrings visible. On the chest of the hoodie, a graphic design features the word "CHMB" in bold, black, block letters with a distressed effect. Below the text are two large star shapes: a deep purple star on the left and a bright blue star on the right, both with subtle pixelated detailing. Underneath the hoodie, a glimpse of a white t-shirt is visible at the hem. He is also wearing black, knee-length athletic shorts made of a smooth, synthetic material, with a slightly matte finish.
pose: The man is standing, looking off to his right with a slight, contemplative gaze. His hands are positioned near the hood of his sweatshirt, with his fingers gently pulling at the edges. His body is angled slightly away from the camera, creating a sense of candidness. His expression is neutral but hints at a thoughtful or perhaps slightly shy demeanor, with his head tilted slightly. There are no overt gestures, contributing to the natural, unposed feel of the image.
enviroment: The background depicts a charming outdoor setting. In front of the subject is a weathered white picket fence, with a few vertical planks missing or slightly askew, adding to a rustic charm. Behind the fence, the ground appears to be a mix of dirt and scattered dry leaves. Further back, a white-painted house with a traditional double door is visible, adorned with decorative hardware. Lush green foliage, including climbing vines with small purple flowers, cascades down a white pergola structure above the door, creating a vibrant, natural backdrop. The overall environment suggests a suburban garden or a quaint backyard.
lighting: The scene is bathed in bright, natural sunlight, indicating it's daytime, likely late morning or early afternoon. The light casts soft, diffused shadows, suggesting the sun is moderately high. There are gentle highlights on the subject's hair and clothing, and a subtle dappled light effect on the ground behind the fence, possibly from the leaves of the plants. The overall lighting is warm and inviting, creating a pleasant and relaxed atmosphere without harsh contrasts.
Final style: Highly detailed, high resolution, handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect
